title: Senior Frontend Developer at Nature's Basket

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Nature's Basket
jsonLd.description:
Nature's Basket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Nature's Basket:
Nature's Basket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket!
